_comment: Package → BAA status registry. Community maintained. AVAILABLE = vendor offers HIPAA BAA. NOT_AVAILABLE = vendor confirmed no BAA. UNKNOWN = not researched. NOT_REQUIRED = package never touches PHI by design.

anthropic.notes: Anthropic offers a HIPAA BAA for API customers on paid plans.
anthropic.touches_phi: only if you send PHI in prompts — use phi_safe_handler.py

openai.notes: OpenAI offers BAA through their Enterprise tier.
openai.touches_phi: only if you send PHI in prompts

twilio.notes: Twilio offers a HIPAA BAA for eligible customers.

sendgrid.notes: SendGrid (Twilio) offers BAA for healthcare customers.

boto3.notes: AWS services support HIPAA via BAA. Specific services listed in AWS documentation.
boto3.touches_phi: if storing/processing PHI in AWS services

google-cloud-storage.notes: Google Cloud supports HIPAA via BAA for eligible services.

fhirclient.notes: Client library only — PHI handling depends on your code and the FHIR server.

fhir.resources.notes: Data model library only — no PHI transmitted.

requests.notes: HTTP library — PHI exposure depends on how it is used.

httpx.notes: HTTP library — PHI exposure depends on how it is used.

sqlalchemy.notes: ORM library — BAA required from database host, not this library.

psycopg2.notes: PostgreSQL driver — BAA required from database host.

pymongo.notes: MongoDB driver — BAA required from MongoDB Atlas or host.

stripe.notes: Stripe does not typically handle clinical PHI. BAA availability not confirmed for healthcare use cases involving PHI.

slack-sdk.notes: Slack offers a HIPAA BAA for Enterprise Grid customers.
slack-sdk.touches_phi: if sending PHI in Slack messages

pagerduty.notes: PagerDuty offers a BAA for healthcare customers.

datadog.notes: Datadog offers a BAA for healthcare/life sciences customers.

sentry-sdk.notes: Sentry offers a BAA for Business and Enterprise plans.
sentry-sdk.touches_phi: if error reports contain PHI — configure scrubbing

redis.notes: Redis client library — BAA required from Redis host (Redis Cloud has BAA).

celery.notes: Task queue library — BAA required from broker host.

pandas.notes: Data processing library — no data transmission.

flask.notes: Web framework — PHI exposure depends on your endpoint design.

fastapi.notes: Web framework — PHI exposure depends on your endpoint design.

django.notes: Web framework — PHI exposure depends on your design.
